name: Midshipman
ability: Outsiders' votes count twice. Each night, choose if you are drunk until dusk. [+0 or +1 Outsider]
firstNightReminder: The Midshipman either nods their head yes to be drunk, or shakes their head no to be sober. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Midshipman either nods their head yes to be drunk, or shakes their head no to be sober. :reminder:
